title: cebatha integra
intro: Cebatha integra, commonly known as Phyllanthus urinaria, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is valued for its health benefits, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anti-diabetic properties, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and kidney stones. The therapeutic actions of Cebatha integra include its ability to stimulate liver function, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
side_effects: Cebatha integra can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and photosensitivity in some individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of cebatha integra can lead to gastrointestinal issues like nausea, vomiting, and stomach pain. In rare cases, using cebatha integra without proper guidance can interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure or diabetes. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using cebatha integra to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
